markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize contract renewal and align on 2026 SEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/53fD1y9pYFbzAW8zS7zMGznJebw_aY6-?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Contract Renewal:** Innerwell's $7k SEO budget is $2k short of GrowthX's $9k minimum for a 6-month term. Noah will seek internal approval for the difference.](https://fathom.video/share/53fD1y9pYFbzAW8zS7zMGznJebw_aY6-?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**Strategic Pivot:** Innerwell is shifting from foundational SEO to a "credibility" strategy focused on high-authority backlinks and original research to compete with firms like Mindbloom.](https://fathom.video/share/53fD1y9pYFbzAW8zS7zMGznJebw_aY6-?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [**Immediate Action:** GrowthX will scope an "insurance hub" strategy for next week's sync, as insurance partnerships are a key credibility signal for Innerwell.](https://fathom.video/share/53fD1y9pYFbzAW8zS7zMGznJebw_aY6-?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [**Production:** The Kansas programmatic page will go live immediately to support a recent launch; city-level pages for DE, ME, and VT will be skipped.](https://fathom.video/share/53fD1y9pYFbzAW8zS7zMGznJebw_aY6-?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)

## Topics

### Contract Renewal & Budget

  - [**GrowthX Offer:** $9k/month for a 6-month term, billed quarterly.](https://fathom.video/share/53fD1y9pYFbzAW8zS7zMGznJebw_aY6-?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This is GrowthX's lowest possible price and shortest term.](https://fathom.video/share/53fD1y9pYFbzAW8zS7zMGznJebw_aY6-?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
  - [**Innerwell Budget:** $7k/month.](https://fathom.video/share/53fD1y9pYFbzAW8zS7zMGznJebw_aY6-?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The previous $14k budget is being split to fund a new link-building initiative.](https://fathom.video/share/53fD1y9pYFbzAW8zS7zMGznJebw_aY6-?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**Negotiation:** Noah will seek internal approval from Lisa for the $2k difference.](https://fathom.video/share/53fD1y9pYFbzAW8zS7zMGznJebw_aY6-?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### 2026 SEO Strategy Pivot

  - [**Driver:** A new company focus on "credibility" and "hyper growth" with shorter-term wins.](https://fathom.video/share/53fD1y9pYFbzAW8zS7zMGznJebw_aY6-?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [**New Strategic Pillars:**](https://fathom.video/share/53fD1y9pYFbzAW8zS7zMGznJebw_aY6-?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
      - [**High-Quality Backlinks:** Invest in a few high-authority links from major outlets, not a high volume of low-quality links.](https://fathom.video/share/53fD1y9pYFbzAW8zS7zMGznJebw_aY6-?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
      - [**Original Research:** Publish medical/statistical research, signed by clinicians and based on Innerwell's patient data, to generate organic media coverage.](https://fathom.video/share/53fD1y9pYFbzAW8zS7zMGznJebw_aY6-?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [**GrowthX Response:**](https://fathom.video/share/53fD1y9pYFbzAW8zS7zMGznJebw_aY6-?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
      - [Acknowledged the pivot and agreed to adapt the strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/53fD1y9pYFbzAW8zS7zMGznJebw_aY6-?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
      - [Proposed scoping an "insurance hub" as an immediate action, as insurance partnerships are a key credibility signal for Innerwell.](https://fathom.video/share/53fD1y9pYFbzAW8zS7zMGznJebw_aY6-?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)

### Production & Content

  - [**Kansas Page:** The programmatic page will go live immediately to support a recent launch.](https://fathom.video/share/53fD1y9pYFbzAW8zS7zMGznJebw_aY6-?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)
  - [**City-Level Pages:**](https://fathom.video/share/53fD1y9pYFbzAW8zS7zMGznJebw_aY6-?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
      - [The Airtable link for city data is correct.](https://fathom.video/share/53fD1y9pYFbzAW8zS7zMGznJebw_aY6-?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)
      - [For DE, ME, and VT, the index page will only list the state, as no city data is available.](https://fathom.video/share/53fD1y9pYFbzAW8zS7zMGznJebw_aY6-?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
  - [**Editorial:** 5 articles are publishing today; 5 more are under review.](https://fathom.video/share/53fD1y9pYFbzAW8zS7zMGznJebw_aY6-?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Noah:** Secure internal approval for the $2k budget increase to meet the $9k/month renewal.](https://fathom.video/share/53fD1y9pYFbzAW8zS7zMGznJebw_aY6-?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**Matt:**](https://fathom.video/share/53fD1y9pYFbzAW8zS7zMGznJebw_aY6-?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
      - [Scope an "insurance hub" strategy for next week's sync.](https://fathom.video/share/53fD1y9pYFbzAW8zS7zMGznJebw_aY6-?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
      - [Publish the Kansas programmatic page immediately.](https://fathom.video/share/53fD1y9pYFbzAW8zS7zMGznJebw_aY6-?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)
      - [Verify the city data Airtable against the redirect list.](https://fathom.video/share/53fD1y9pYFbzAW8zS7zMGznJebw_aY6-?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
